endpoints.name: Get Renewal Data for the passed Client/User or logged in user. Priority is given to userKey over clientKey.

parameters.name: ClientKey
parameters.description: ClientKey of the primary user for which renewal is requested

parameters.name: UserKey
parameters.description: UserKey of the user for which renewal is requested

endpoints.name: Update Renewal Data/Documents for the given renewal entity

parameters.name: TypeOfTrigger
parameters.description: Type Of Trigger to be selected

children.name: ClientTriggered
children.description: For personal updates like address changes when no renewal exists already. If renewal already exists, same would be updated

children.name: TimeTrigger
children.description: Time Trigger ODD as per Saxo Compliance would be initiated on client if no renewal exists already. If renewal already exists, same would be updated wihout change in trigger

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: The number of entries to skip from the beginning of the collection

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: The number of entries to return from the beginning of the collection

parameters.name: ContractingEntity
parameters.description: List of Active Contracting Entity as present in CRM except for Swiss and Japan

parameters.name: ContractType
parameters.description: Contract Type - Private, JointAccount, Corporate, LocalAssetSolution

parameters.name: SalesOffice
parameters.description: List of Sales Office as present in CRM except for Swiss and Japan

endpoints.name: Gets renewal status for clients, under logged user or the passed owner

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: The number of entries to skip from the beginning of the collection

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: The number of entries to return from the beginning of the collection

parameters.name: MustRenewBy
parameters.description: Optional, Date till which the pending renewals should be returned, default value is 30 days from today

parameters.name: OwnerKey
parameters.description: Optional, ClientKey of the owner, whose subclient's renewal status is needed
